# TechPersona Studio

> Website redesign and lead automation for service businesses — based in Worcester, MA, serving clients everywhere.
> Solo studio run by Thao Phuong. One person on your project, start to finish.

## About

TechPersona Studio is a one-person web design studio founded by Thao Phuong. Thao spent 6 years writing software for big tech companies in Boston, MA before starting TechPersona Studio to bring the same engineering to small service businesses.

- Founder: Thao Phuong, web designer and software engineer based in Worcester, MA
- Founded: 2026
- Contact: info@techpersonastudio.com | +1 857-800-2667
- Location: Worcester, MA — fully remote, serving clients across the US

## Services

### Website Redesign for Service Businesses
Full website rebuild designed to rank in local search and convert visitors to calls or bookings. Includes a free website audit, competitor research, mobile-first design, SEO setup, and 30 days of post-launch refinement. One-time project, scoped before you commit.

### Quiet Systems — Lead Automation
Automated follow-up that runs in the background. When a customer submits a form or calls after hours, the system sends an instant reply and a booking link. Works alongside any website. Nothing to log into or manage.

## Who we work with

Restaurants, nail salons, hair salons, plumbers, electricians, HVAC companies, landscapers, realtors, and other local service businesses that rely on phone calls, bookings, or walk-ins. Based in Worcester, MA — work is fully remote so location is no barrier.

## How it works

1. Free audit — send your URL and receive a short walkthrough within 2 business days
2. Scope call — find your single biggest fix and see the full price before committing
3. Build — website, lead system, or both — with 30 days of post-launch refinement

Steps 1 and 2 are free. The audit is yours to keep regardless of what you decide next.

## Pricing

Scoped per project. See the full price on the call before committing. Most first projects are one-time, not a monthly retainer.

## Common questions

**How long does a website redesign take?**
Most website builds run 2 to 4 weeks from scoping call to launch. A Quiet System adds 1 to 2 weeks.

**What does the free audit include?**
A short walkthrough of your site covering what's costing you leads, what needs to change, and what to fix first. Delivered within 2 business days.

**Do you work outside Worcester, MA?**
Yes. The process is fully remote. Most clients are in Greater Worcester and Boston, but TechPersona Studio works with service businesses across the US.

**What is a Quiet System?**
Automated follow-up for missed calls and after-hours form submissions. The system replies instantly with a booking link so no lead goes cold overnight.

## Free offer

Free website audit: https://www.techpersonastudio.com/#audit
Audit delivered in about 2 business days. No commitment. Yours to keep.
